Features
Innovative Trading for a Global Market
Access top-tier trading features and deep liquidity on the platform trusted by millions worldwide.
Futures & Derivatives
Access a comprehensive suite of futures and derivatives products. Manage risk, hedge positions, and take advantage of market opportunities with our advanced derivatives offerings.
Spot and Margin Trading
Engage in spot and margin trading with leverage options up to 100x. Whether you’re a conservative trader or a risk-taker, our platform caters to all trading styles and preferences.
We are trusted by over 27,000+ business

How to Invest ?

    Sign Up On Vinance

    Start trading to get up to $500 in Mystery Box prizes!

  • 2

    Verified Your Account

    Start trading to get up to $500 in Mystery Box prizes!

  • 3

    Deposit / Buy Crypto

    Fund your cryptocurrency account to begin trading. A wide variety of payment methods are supported.

  • 4

    Trade

    Start buying and selling cryptocurrencies, and explore even more KuCoin products and services!

Our Reputation Reflect From The Numbers Here
Transparent and Low-Cost Trading - Enjoy one of the most transparent and cost-effective trading experiences in the industry, with competitive fees and no hidden costs. Innovative Features for Modern Traders - From algorithmic trading to staking and yield farming, our platform is packed with the latest innovations in cryptocurrency trading.
Security First
With 98% of funds stored offline, your assets are safe with us.
Global Presence
With a presence in over 100 countries, our platform is accessible globally.
Low Fees
